raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"By 'make this stronger', do you primarily mean (a) strengthening the conceptual framing and novelty claims, (b) improving the writing polish and flow, (c) enhancing the logical structure and evidence support, or (d) a combination of these?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to make the draft stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis and contribution claims to be more impactful.","R1.4":"Assessing and strengthening the novelty against prior work is central to making the paper's claims stronger.","R1.6":"Polishing the writing at the sentence and paragraph level is a central way to make the overall draft stronger and more persuasive.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties is central when strengthening claims to maintain scientific integrity.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration while making the draft stronger.","RX.3":"Adhering to the original scope is central to ensure strengthening does not introduce irrelevant expansions.","RX.4":"Avoiding downstream harms is central given the medical context of the artifact to prevent misleading clinical applications.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral but necessary for any modifications to the draft."}}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'make this stronger', do you primarily mean (a) strengthening the conceptual framing and novelty claims, (b) improving the writing polish and flow, (c) enhancing the logical structure and evidence support, or (d) a combination of these?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to make the draft stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis and contribution claims to be more impactful.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing and strengthening the novelty against prior work is central to making the paper's claims stronger.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing the writing at the sentence and paragraph level is a central way to make the overall draft stronger and more persuasive.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is central when strengthening claims to maintain scientific integrity.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration while making the draft stronger.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the original scope is central to ensure strengthening does not introduce irrelevant expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is central given the medical context of the artifact to prevent misleading clinical applications.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral but necessary for any modifications to the draft.
